input_text: Mary was in a room. The city was destroyed. The cat sat on the mat and purred. The toy of the child was broken. The teacher showed the students a map. Sheep are afraid of mice. Unexpectedly, the door opened. If a bear eats red berries, it is big. Estonia is not outside Europe. Catholics can not disappear. The bike's length is 10 kilometers. The cup filled with water fell. The horse kept in the stable was calm. John eats berries. The book was read by Sara. Mike is nice. The street is in Tallinn. The letter was written in June. Tom wanted to leave. Dole was defeated by Clinton. John is a bear. Eve failed to finish the report. The elephant was cool. The man carrying a bag waved. Mark is under a house. Sandra travelled to the hallway. If X1 is a grandfather of Y1, Y1 is a grandchild of X1. The tree was cut by the farmer. A village road was narrow. The picture was painted by Leo. Any person is male or female. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. Agatha is in trouble. The stone was heavy. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. John is big?
